markets.question: Will the fight be won by KO or TKO?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the fight between Tai Tuivasa and Louie Sutherland at UFC Fight Night: Della Maddalena vs. Prates, scheduled for May 2, 2026, ends by KO or TKO, including referee stoppage, doctor stoppage, or corner stoppage. Otherwise, it will resolve to "No."

If the fight ends in a draw or by disqualification (either fighter), it will resolve "No."

If the bout is ruled a No Contest, not scored, canceled, or postponed beyond May 16, 2026, this market will resolve "50-50."

The resolution source for this market will be official information from the UFC.

events.title: UFC Fight Night: Tai Tuivasa vs. Louie Sutherland (Heavyweight, Main Card)
events.description:
This market will resolve to "Tai Tuivasa" if Tai Tuivasa is officially declared the winner of the fight against Louie Sutherland at UFC Fight Night: Della Maddalena vs. Prates, scheduled for May 2, 2026.

It will resolve to "Louie Sutherland" if Louie Sutherland is officially declared the winner.

If the fight is declared a draw or technical draw, ruled a No Contest, not scored, canceled, or postponed beyond May 16, 2026, this market will resolve "50-50."

The resolution source for this market will be official information from the UFC.

eventMetadata.context_description: Tai Tuivasa faces short-notice replacement Louie "Vanilla Gorilla" Sutherland on the UFC Fight Night Perth main card after Sean Sharaf's injury withdrawal eight days ago, a pivotal shift favoring the Australian heavyweight amid his six-fight skid dating back to 2022. Both made weight yesterday—Tuivasa at 265 pounds, Sutherland at 261—with no reported issues, setting up a striker vs. grappler clash where Tuivasa's knockout power and Perth home crowd support provide early momentum advantages despite recent grappling vulnerabilities exposed in losses. Sutherland, 10-5 overall but 0-2 in UFC, arrives from Scotland with limited prep and transcontinental travel, testing trader consensus on Tuivasa's bounce-back potential versus the underdog's grinding upset path in this three-round heavyweight bout.

markets.question: Game 1: Both Teams Destroy Inhibitors?
markets.description:
This market is about whether both teams destroy at least one enemy inhibitor during Game 1. In League of Legends, each team has three inhibitors (one in each lane), located behind the inner turrets.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Team WE and JD Gaming each destroy at least one enemy inhibitor during Game 1. This market will resolve to "No" if either team (or both teams) do not destroy any enemy inhibitors.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed and ends via surrender, this market will resolve based on whether both teams destroyed at least one inhibitor prior to stoppage. If the condition was not met, this market will resolve to "No".

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

events.title: LoL: Team WE vs JD Gaming (BO3) - LPL Group Ascend
events.description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Team WE and JD Gaming in the LPL Group Ascend, initially scheduled for May 2 at 3:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Team WE" if Team WE win the match against JD Gaming.

This market will resolve to "JD Gaming" if JD Gaming win the match against Team WE.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: JD Gaming holds commanding trader consensus over winless Team WE in this LPL Group Ascend BO3, driven by a 6-3 series record and five-series win streak, including a 2-1 victory over WE just a week ago on April 25. Team WE languishes at 0-9 series (1-18 games), extending their skid with a 0-2 loss to Bilibili Gaming last weekend amid poor macro execution and individual underperformance from Cube and Tyrion. JDG's dominant 20-7 head-to-head history, bolstered by Xiaoxu and Junjia's frontline strength, favors them in the double round-robin format where game differential and tiebreakers loom large for top-4 playoff seeding. Stable rosters on patch 26.8 leave little room for WE upset without major draft edges.

markets.question: Game 1: Any Player Quadra Kill?
markets.description:
This market is about whether any player achieves a Quadra Kill during Game 1. In League of Legends, a Quadra Kill occurs when a single player kills 4 enemy champions in rapid succession.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if any player on either team achieves a Quadra Kill during Game 1. This market will resolve to "No" if no player achieves a Quadra Kill. A Penta Kill (5 kills in rapid succession) also counts as a Quadra Kill having occurred for the purposes of this market.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed and ends via surrender, this market will resolve based on whether a Quadra Kill occurred prior to stoppage. If no Quadra Kill occurred, this market will resolve to "No".

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

markets.question: Game 1: Both Teams Slay Baron Nashor?
markets.description:
This market is about whether both teams slay the Baron Nashor at least once during Game 1. Baron Nashor is a powerful neutral objective in League of Legends that first spawns at 20:00 game time and respawns 6 minutes after each death, granting the slaying team the Hand of Baron buff.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Invictus Gaming and Anyone's Legend each slay Baron Nashor at least once during Game 1. This market will resolve to "No" if either team (or both teams) does not slay Baron Nashor during Game 1.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed and ends via surrender, this market will resolve based on whether both teams had slain Baron Nashor prior to stoppage. If the condition was not met, this market will resolve to "No".

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

eventMetadata.context_description: Anyone's Legend holds a narrow edge in trader consensus for this LPL 2026 Split 2 Group Ascend BO3 rematch against Invictus Gaming, fueled by their recent 2-0 sweep of IG on April 28 and yesterday's dominant 2-0 upset over second-place Top Esports, extending a four-series win streak to solidify fourth in standings with a +3 game differential. IG sits sixth at 3-5 overall but showed resilience in a 2-1 reverse sweep of Weibo Gaming on May 1, leveraging their stable roster including Rookie and new head coach Helper—formerly of AL—for potential stylistic edges. Head-to-head history favors AL (12-5 maps), though double round-robin format and top-four playoff spots heighten stakes amid Patch 26.7 meta shifts.

markets.question: Game 1: Both Teams Slay a Dragon?
markets.description:
This market is about whether both teams slay at least one elemental dragon during Game 1. In League of Legends, elemental dragons (Infernal, Mountain, Ocean, Hextech, Chemtech, and Cloud) spawn in the dragon pit starting at 5:00 game time. After being slain, the next dragon spawns 5 minutes later. Once a team claims the Dragon Soul (by slaying four dragons), all subsequent dragon spawns become Elder Dragons.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Invictus Gaming and Anyone's Legend each slay at least one elemental dragon during Game 1. This market will resolve to "No" if either team (or both teams) does not slay any elemental dragon during Game 1. Only elemental dragons count toward this market — Elder Dragon kills do not count.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed and ends via surrender, this market will resolve based on whether both teams had slain at least one elemental dragon prior to stoppage. If the condition was not met, this market will resolve to "No".

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

eventMetadata.context_description: In the Honor of Kings Challenger Cup Stage 1 single-elimination bracket, KPL powerhouse AG Super Play faces rising challenger squad WST in a pivotal BO7 matchup on May 2, determining advancement to the quarterfinals. AG Super Play, boasting veterans like YiNuo and recent roster additions XiaoYu and Jiushu, scraped through Round 1 with a gritty 3-2 comeback over RW Mania four days ago, showcasing resilience amid a subpar KPL Spring where they failed to defend their title. WST, featuring loaned jungler BaiLian and midlaner XiaoHan, pulled off an upset BO5 win against CKU, leveraging aggressive macro play but lacking AG's pedigree and depth. No roster changes or injuries reported; trader consensus reflects AG's superior head-to-head experience and map control edge in extended BO7 series, though WST's momentum poses upset potential in this high-stakes knockout.

Both sides scored seven goals apiece in their last five outings.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Cape Town be 14°C on May 4?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Cape Town International Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 4 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Cape Town International Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/za/matroosfontein/FACT.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: South African Weather Service (SAWS) guidance and forecast model consensus, including AccuWeather and yr.no, point to a high temperature near 19°C in Cape Town on May 4, with partly cloudy skies, isolated showers possible in the morning, and light westerly winds. This follows the eastward shift of recent heavy downpours and severe weather systems over the past 48 hours, which brought cooler conditions and unsettled patterns but are now subsiding, allowing typical autumn stabilization. Climatological May highs average 20°C, with minimal deviation expected absent unusual ridge development. Traders should monitor SAWS updates at 05:00 and 16:00 SAST daily, as observations from official stations like Cape Town International Airport will resolve the market amid inherent short-term forecast uncertainty.

markets.question: Will "Bully - Ye" be the Billboard 200 #1 album for the week of May 9?
markets.description:
Billboard updates the Billboard 200 albums chart each Tuesday (with adjusted release schedules on some holiday weeks), reflecting data from the previous week (Friday-Thursday). Each Billboard chart is then dated “Week of (date of the upcoming Saturday)”.

This market will resolve according to the number 1 album on the Billboard 200 chart dated “Week of May 9, 2026”.

This market will resolve as soon as the relevant chart is published. If the Billboard 200 chart for the specified week is not published within 14 calendar days of the expected release date, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The resolution source for this market will be the Billboard 200 chart for the specified week, published on the Billboard website (https://www.billboard.com/charts/billboard-200/) or through other official Billboard channels.

events.title: UFC Fight Night: Carlos Prates vs. Jack Della Maddalena (Welterweight, Main Card)
events.description:
This market will resolve to "Carlos Prates" if Carlos Prates is officially declared the winner of the fight against Jack Della Maddalena at UFC Fight Night: Della Maddalena vs. Prates, scheduled for May 2, 2026.

It will resolve to "Jack Della Maddalena" if Jack Della Maddalena is officially declared the winner.

If the fight is declared a draw or technical draw, ruled a No Contest, not scored, canceled, or postponed beyond May 16, 2026, this market will resolve "50-50."

The resolution source for this market will be official information from the UFC.

eventMetadata.context_description: Jack Della Maddalena faces Carlos Prates in the welterweight main event at UFC Fight Night Perth on May 2, hosting at RAC Arena with home-crowd energy boosting the top-ranked Australian after a six-month layoff and recent loss. Prates rides momentum from five knockouts in his last six UFC bouts, showcasing elite striking power and hype from viral weigh-in footage, though Della Maddalena's volume striking (adjusted SLpM 5.18) and strength-of-schedule edge counter that threat. Both made weight without issues, setting up a high-stakes striker's duel where rust versus recent finishes, stylistic edges in reach and knockout potential, and Della Maddalena's championship pedigree drive closely contested trader consensus amid no reported injuries or withdrawals.

markets.question: Map 2: Odd/Even Total Kills?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 2 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 2 is an even number.

"Total combined kills" includes all kills recorded during the match across all rounds, including kills during regulation rounds and overtime rounds if applicable. Team kills (friendly fire) and self-inflicted deaths (e.g., falling damage, own grenade) do not count as kills for the purposes of this market.

If no kills are recorded in Map 2, or if Map 2 is canceled (not played at all), or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Map 2 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Counter-Strike: Imperial Academy vs Infinite (BO3) - United21 Playoffs
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Upper bracket quarterfinal 1 match between Imperial Academy and Infinite in the United21 Playoffs, initially scheduled for April 9 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Imperial Academy" if Imperial Academy win the match against Infinite.

This market will resolve to "Infinite" if Infinite win the match against Imperial Academy.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Imperial Academy entered the United21 Season 47 playoffs with strong momentum from a flawless 2-0 group stage run, posting a +16 map differential via gritty 2-1 win over LPH Gaming and dominant 2-0 over Sangal ALTERS, signaling roster cohesion around ta9z, sh1Fu, and aZe. Infinite advanced 2-1 from Group D amid -9 differential and instability, suffering a 1-2 loss to Misa Esports while relying on stand-ins like fnl for Blytz in the BO3 opener against Imperial on April 9. Recent HLTV form highlighted Imperial's 37.5% win rate in tier-3 events like European Pro League, versus Infinite's inconsistent results, framing a closely contested upper bracket quarterfinal where map control on Ancient, Mirage, and Nuke proved decisive.

markets.question: Will Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) win the most seats in the 2026 Tamil Nadu Legislative Assembly election?
markets.description:
Legislative Assembly elections are to be scheduled to be held in Tamil Nadu, India, in March–May 2026.

This market will resolve according to the political party that wins the greatest number of seats in the Tamil Nadu Legislative Assembly in the 2026 election.

If the results are not known definitively by October 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

In the event of a tie between multiple parties for the most seats won, this market will resolve in favor of the party that received a greater number of valid votes. If that also results in a tie, this market will resolve in favor of the party whose listed abbreviation appears first in alphabetical order.

This market’s resolution will be based solely on the number of seats won by the named party in the Tamil Nadu Legislative Assembly.

This market will resolve based on the results of this election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results reported by the Indian government, specifically the Election Commission of India (ECI) (https://eci.gov.in). If multiple official reports differ, this market will resolve based on the one that includes the greatest number of Assembly Constituencies (ACs).

eventMetadata.context_description: Following the April 23 single-phase polling in the Tamil Nadu Legislative Assembly election, marked by record 85% turnout, exit polls from multiple pollsters project a comfortable majority for the incumbent DMK-led Secular Progressive Alliance, bolstering trader consensus at 86.5% implied probability for DMK as the winner. This reflects sustained incumbency advantages under Chief Minister MK Stalin, including popular welfare schemes and a stable alliance with INC, despite anti-incumbency concerns. Actor Vijay's TVK, at 7.8%, emerges as a strong debut disruptor drawing neutral and youth votes, while ADMK-led NDA at 7.0% struggles with internal divisions and failure to consolidate opposition. Results counting on May 4 could shift odds amid potential hung assembly risks highlighted in some pre-poll surveys.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Houston be between 54-55°F on May 4?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the William P. Hobby Airport Station in degrees Fahrenheit on 4 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the William P. Hobby Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/us/tx/houston/KHOU.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Fahrenheit (eg, 21°F). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: National Weather Service climatological data and extended forecasts from NOAA-affiliated models like GFS and ECMWF underpin the 99.6% trader consensus for Houston's May 4 high reaching 68°F or higher, with normals around 83°F and historical daily highs bottoming at 70°F only once (1954). Long-range outlooks from AccuWeather and others project 78–87°F amid typical early-May warming trends, reinforced by the Old Farmer's Almanac's warmer-than-average spring 2026 call and absence of cold fronts in recent guidance. No recent developments signal cooling; upper-air patterns favor zonal flow. Realistic challenges include an unforeseen trough inducing clouds and onshore flow, though model ensembles show minimal spread—watch NWS 12-hourly updates for refinements.

markets.question: Will the Oklahoma City Thunder win the 2026 NBA Finals?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the Oklahoma City Thunder win the 2026 NBA Finals. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market will resolve to “No” if it becomes impossible for this team to win the 2026 NBA Finals based off the rules of the NBA.

The resolution source for this market will be information from the NBA.

events.title: 2026 NBA Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NBA Finals.

eventMetadata.context_description: Oklahoma City Thunder's trader consensus at 55.5% implied probability stems from their status as defending champions and No. 1 Western Conference seed, bolstered by a dominant 4-0 first-round sweep over the Suns that showcased Shai Gilgeous-Alexander's MVP-caliber play and Chet Holmgren's rim protection amid widespread playoff injuries decimating rivals. San Antonio Spurs at 20% surged after Victor Wembanyama's double-double heroics powered a comeback series win over the Trail Blazers—their first playoff victory since 2017—positioning them favorably for the Western Conference semifinals against the Nuggets-Timberwolves winner. Boston Celtics' odds slipped to 9.3% amid a grueling 3-2 series lead over the 76ers, while Eastern top seed Detroit Pistons teeter at 3.3% in a 3-3 tie versus Orlando Magic, highlighting chaotic matchups and health uncertainties extending first-round series.

markets.question: Will Amanda Anisimova be the 2026 Women’s Wimbledon Winner?
markets.description:
Wimbledon 2026 is scheduled for June 29 - July 12, 2026.

This market will resolve to the player that wins the 2026 Wimbledon Women’s Singles Tournament.

If at any point it becomes impossible for a listed player to win the 2026 Wimbledon Women’s Singles Tournament per the rules of the tournament, the corresponding market will resolve to “No”.

If the 2026 Wimbledon Women’s Singles Tournament is cancelled, postponed after August 31, 2026, or there is otherwise no winner declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from Wimbledon (https://www.wimbledon.com/index.html); however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

events.title: 2026 Women's Wimbledon Winner
events.description:
Wimbledon 2026 is scheduled for June 29 - July 12, 2026.

If at any point it becomes impossible for a listed player to win the 2026 Wimbledon Women’s Singles Tournament per the rules of the tournament, the corresponding market will resolve to “No”.

eventMetadata.context_description: World No. 1 Aryna Sabalenka leads trader consensus at 29% implied probability for the 2026 Women's Wimbledon title, buoyed by her explosive power game suited to grass despite a shocking quarterfinal upset loss to Hailey Baptiste in Madrid last week after saving six match points. Elena Rybakina trails closely at 23.5% following her Australian Open triumph over Sabalenka and Stuttgart clay title earlier this month, leveraging her 2022 Wimbledon championship pedigree and massive serve. Iga Świątek's 15.9% reflects No. 4 ranking but persistent grass-surface struggles. Breakout No. 6 Amanda Anisimova (7.5%) and grass specialist Elise Mertens (7.0%) highlight depth, with recent WTA volatility and injury uncertainties like Sabalenka's pre-Stuttgart withdrawal keeping the field competitively bunched under 30%.

markets.question: Will Ro Khanna win the 2028 Democratic presidential nomination?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the named individual wins and accepts the 2028 nomination of the Democratic Party for U.S. president. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of official Democratic Party sources.

Any replacement of the democratic nominee before election day will not change the resolution of the market.

events.title: Democratic Presidential Nominee 2028
events.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the named individual wins and accepts the 2028 nomination of the Democratic Party for U.S. president. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of official Democratic Party sources.

eventMetadata.context_description: Gavin Newsom leads trader consensus for the 2028 Democratic presidential nomination at 26.3% implied probability in a wide-open primary field, reflecting his perceived electability edge in early general election polls against potential GOP foes like JD Vance, amid skepticism toward Kamala Harris following her 2024 defeat. Harris's April 10 signal of interest in another run drew immediate pushback, with top Democrats refusing endorsements by late April and liberal columnists arguing against her candidacy, capping her at 11%. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez trails at 8.5% on progressive base appeal, while Jon Ossoff's 6.6% stems from Georgia swing-state strength. Consolidation could hinge on 2026 midterm results, fundraising leads, and party endorsements, with Pete Buttigieg and Josh Shapiro teasing bids at recent events.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket reflects high uncertainty for Chengdu Shuangliu International Airport's highest temperature on May 3, with implied odds tightly split between 23°C (27%) and 24°C (26%), driven by divergent short-range forecasts from the China Meteorological Administration (CMA) guidance around 24–27°C under cloudy skies and cooler ensemble signals from AccuWeather (23°C) and BBC (24°C) emphasizing persistent thick cloud cover. Recent days, including May 1's observed 20°C peak, have featured overcast conditions suppressing diurnal heating below May norms of 26–28°C amid Sichuan Basin stratiform clouds, differentiating outcomes via potential afternoon partial clearing for insolation-driven spikes to 25°C or sustained low-level stratus capping at 23°C. New CMA updates and global model runs (GFS, ECMWF) overnight may refine this before hourly airport observations resolve the market.

markets.question: Will Bitcoin reach $1,000,000 by December 31, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will immediately resolve to "Yes" if any Binance 1 minute candle for Bitcoin (BTC/USDT) between November 24, 2025, 14:00 and December 31, 2026, 23:59 in the ET timezone has a final "High" price equal to or greater than the price specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No."

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT "High" prices available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT, with the chart settings on "1m" for one-minute candles selected on the top bar.

Please note that the outcome of this market depends solely on the price data from the Binance BTC/USDT trading pair. Prices from other exchanges, different trading pairs, or spot markets will not be considered for the resolution of this market.

markets.question: Will Taylor Pendrith win the 2026 Cadillac Championship?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the listed player who wins the 2026 Cadillac Championship tournament.

If a listed player is eliminated from contention for the Cadillac Championship tournament based on the official rules of the tournament, the relevant market will immediately resolve to "No".

If an unlisted player wins the Cadillac Championship tournament this market will resolve to "Other".

In the event of a tie, this market will resolve according to the official winner as determined by PGA Tour official tournament rules. If multiple winners are announced then this market will resolve to the player whose listed last name comes first alphabetically.

If no winner is announced by May 9, 2026 at 8:00PM ET this market will resolve to "Other".

The primary resolution source will be the official results published by the PGA Tour website (https://www.pgatour.com/).

eventMetadata.context_description: Cameron Young's commanding five-stroke lead at 13-under par after a bogey-free opening 64 and second-round 67 on Trump National Doral's demanding Blue Monster Course has solidified trader consensus around his outright victory, reflecting the wisdom of crowds in this $20 million Signature Event. The world No. 4's length off the tee and hot putter propelled him ahead of the T2 group—Jordan Spieth, Alex Smalley, and Nick Taylor—at 8-under, while Scottie Scheffler lurks seven back at 6-under following a steady Friday 67 despite an even-par start. No major injury news or weather disruptions have emerged, leaving Young's momentum and course fit as key drivers positioning him as the heavy favorite entering the weekend rounds.

markets.question: Brentford FC vs. West Ham United FC: O/U 9.5 Total Corners
markets.description: In the upcoming Premier League game between Brentford FC and West Ham United FC, scheduled for May 2, 2026 at 10:00 AM ET: This market will resolve to "Over" if there are 10 or more total corners awarded in this game (combining corners for both teams). If the total number of corners is fewer than 10, this market will resolve to "Under". If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50. This market refers only to corners awarded within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time. Corners awarded during extra time or penalty shootouts do not count. The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 24 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Brentford FC vs. West Ham United FC - Total Corners
events.description: Total corners markets for the Premier League game between Brentford FC and West Ham United FC, scheduled for May 2, 2026 at 10:00 AM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Brentford's recent six-match winless streak, marked by low-scoring draws like 0-0 vs Fulham and 2-2 vs Everton, has contributed to modest home corner totals averaging 8.82 per game, tempering trader expectations for high volume against West Ham. The hosts sit 9th in the Premier League table with 48 points, hampered by injuries to Rico Henry, Vitaly Janelt, and Fábio Carvalho that limit wing play and set-piece threats. West Ham, 17th on 36 points in relegation peril, average 11.26 total corners in matches but face a tough away fixture post their injury-time win over Everton, with Jarrod Bowen key for big chances. Head-to-heads often exceed 10 corners, yet predictions lean under 10.0 given Brentford's defensive setup and both teams' subdued recent form.

markets.question: Will "Running Point: Season 2" be the top global Netflix show this week?
markets.description:

This market will resolve based on which show this update ranks as the #1 global Netflix show.

The ranking is based on total views globally, as reported by Netflix for TV shows (English only).

If the top10.netflix.com update does not occur by May 8, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

markets.question: Will "Octane - Don Toliver" be the Billboard 200 #1 album for the week of May 9?
markets.description:
Billboard updates the Billboard 200 albums chart each Tuesday (with adjusted release schedules on some holiday weeks), reflecting data from the previous week (Friday-Thursday). Each Billboard chart is then dated “Week of (date of the upcoming Saturday)”.

This market will resolve according to the number 1 album on the Billboard 200 chart dated “Week of May 9, 2026”.

This market will resolve as soon as the relevant chart is published. If the Billboard 200 chart for the specified week is not published within 14 calendar days of the expected release date, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The resolution source for this market will be the Billboard 200 chart for the specified week, published on the Billboard website (https://www.billboard.com/charts/billboard-200/) or through other official Billboard channels.

markets.question: Will ForecastEx self-certify sports event contracts by June 30, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the listed Designated Contract Market (DCM) self-certifies sports-related event-based contracts with the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) between market creation and June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

The primary resolution source will be official information released by the CFTC or the respective DCM; however, a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

events.title: Which DCMs self-certify sports event contracts by June 30?
events.description:

The primary resolution source will be official information released by the CFTC or the respective DCM; however, a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: The CFTC's March 12, 2026 advisory provides clear guidance for Designated Contract Markets (DCMs) to self-certify sports event contracts via Regulation 40.2, stressing pre-filing engagement with sports leagues, official data sources for settlement, and detailed manipulation risk analyses to ensure compliance with core principles. April federal appeals court rulings, including in Kalshi's favor, solidified CFTC's exclusive jurisdiction over such prediction market products, preempting state gambling laws. CME has already self-certified, while trader focus remains on LedgerX, Aristotle, Railbird, and others amid post-ANPRM comment period clarity; no new filings reported in late April, with June 30 deadline approaching as potential rulemaking looms.

markets.question: Will Meta have the #1 AI model at the end of May 2026 (Style Control On)?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the company that owns the model that has the highest arena rank (Style Control On) based on the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (https://lmarena.ai/) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on May 31, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

Results from the "Rank" column under the "Text Arena | Overall" Leaderboard tab at https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with style control on will be used to resolve this market.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. If two or more models are tied on rank, they will be ordered by their Arena score, including any underlying, unrounded, granular values reflected in the data below the leaderboard. If a tie remains, alphabetical order of company names as listed in this market group will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if the two models are tied by exact arena score, “Google” would be ranked ahead of “xAI”). This market will resolve based on the company that occupies first place under this ranking system.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and will resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.

markets.question: Will West Ham be relegated from the English Premier League after the 2025–26 season?
markets.description:
This is a polymarket to predict which clubs are relegated from the English Premier League after the 2025–26 season.

If the listed club is officially relegated by the English Premier League following the 2025–26 season, this market will resolve to "Yes". Otherwise, it will resolve to "No".

If the 2025–26 English Premier League season is canceled or not completed by October 1, 2026, this market will resolve to "No".

The primary resolution source will be official information from the English Premier League. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Wolves and Burnley have been mathematically relegated from the Premier League, leaving one survival spot amid a tense bottom-table scrap where West Ham (36 points from 34 games, GD -16) hold a slim edge over Tottenham Hotspur (34 points, GD -10), with Nottingham Forest (39 points, GD -4) three points clear in 16th. Leeds United's 3-1 win over Burnley yesterday propelled them to 43 points—nine ahead of the drop zone and a historically safe total, as no team has ever been relegated with that many. Forest's strong recent form (three wins in last four) bolsters their position, while West Ham's stoppage-time triumph versus Everton provides momentum. Pivotal remaining fixtures include Spurs' trip to Aston Villa and home clash with Leeds, alongside West Ham's visits to Brentford and Newcastle, with goal difference and injury updates critical as the season nears its May climax.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Tokyo be 27°C on May 4?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Tokyo Haneda Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 4 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Tokyo Haneda Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/jp/tokyo/RJTT.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket closely splits between 24°C (26.5%) and 25°C (24.0%) as the highest temperature at Tokyo's Haneda Airport station on May 4, reflecting uncertainty in Japan Meteorological Agency (JMA) short-range forecast ensembles amid this spring's persistent above-average warmth. Recent midday readings exceeding 24°C on May 2—well above the early May climatological average of 22°C—have sustained bullish sentiment for mid-20s highs, driven by a stubborn high-pressure ridge aloft promoting sunny intervals and elevated insolation. However, an approaching weak frontal boundary introduces variability, with models diverging on cloud cover and scattered showers that could cap peaks at 22-23°C or allow brief clearing for 25-26°C. JMA's next advisory on May 3 will refine timing of any precipitation, a key differentiator for resolution.

markets.question: Will Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) hit (LOW) $3.75 Week of May 4 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during the week of May 4 2026, any 1-minute candle for Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) has a final "Low" price equal to or below the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) "Low" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.OPEN%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.OPEN%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily low price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

The primary resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting; however, if there is any ambiguity in the results, this market will resolve according to official information from the City of Los Angeles.

markets.question: Will Discord’s market cap be $30B or greater at market close on IPO day?
markets.description:
This market will resolve based on Discord's market capitalization at the closing price on its first day of trading.

If no IPO occurs by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "No IPO by June 30, 2026".

Market capitalization expresses the monetary value of a company’s outstanding shares, stated in its pricing currency. It is calculated as the number of shares outstanding multiplied by the closing share price on the first trading day.

If the relevant value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

Resolution will be based on the primary exchange’s official listing page. In the event that the relevant figure is not displayed, another reliable source will be used.

In the event of an interruption in the course of the normal trading session on Discord’s first day of trading (e.g., a circuit breaker or half-day), the market will resolve according to the official closing price of the abbreviated session. If no such official closing price is published, the market will resolve according to the next trading day on which an official closing price is published, treating that as the first day of trading for purposes of this market.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket prices an overwhelming 79.5% implied probability against a Discord IPO by June 30, 2026, stemming from stalled momentum since the firm's confidential SEC filing in early January amid a subdued market for growth-stage tech listings. Secondary market valuations have compressed to $7–10 billion from 2021 peaks near $15 billion, pressured by revenue of roughly $800 million—modest relative to 200+ million monthly active users—and monetization challenges tied to a young, gamer-heavy base that resists premium uptake. The 18.3% on <15B market cap captures conditional bets on a deeply discounted debut, while slim odds above 15B highlight enterprise rebranding hurdles and cratered SaaS multiples; key catalysts include any public S-1 or Q2 economic data influencing IPO pipelines.

markets.question: Will Xi Jinping purge Wang Huning in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if either of the following conditions are met by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

1) The listed individual is removed or resigns from their primary political post or from their position, if any, on the Chinese Politburo or its standing committee, with a consensus of credible reporting describing the resignation/removal as a “purge”, “ousting”, or similar language, or to have presumably or definitively occurred as a result of corruption, bribery, other criminal wrongdoing, or a lack of political favor.

2) The listed individual is expelled from the Chinese Communist Party (CCP). 

Qualifying announcements and reporting of a purge before this market's end date will immediately resolve this market to "Yes", regardless of when the announced resignation/removal/expulsion goes into effect.

A listed individual leaving office at the end of a regularly scheduled term, or being removed/resigning from office without a consensus of credible reporting describing the resignation/removal as a “purge”, “ousting”, or similar language, or to have presumably or definitively occurred as a result of corruption, bribery, other criminal wrongdoing, or a lack of political favor, will not qualify.

The resolution sources for this market will be information from the Chinese Government and a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: Xi Jinping's anti-corruption campaign has accelerated in 2026, most recently ousting Politburo member and Guangdong party secretary Ma Xingrui in early April for "severe violations"—the third such incumbent removal in six months—signaling deepening scrutiny of top civilian leaders. Military purges dominate, with Central Military Commission Vice Chairman Zhang Youxia and Chief of Staff Liu Zhenli investigated in January, followed by nine PLA officers stripped from the National People's Congress in February ahead of the Two Sessions, and additional generals detained in March. These Central Commission for Discipline Inspection actions aim to ensure loyalty in the People's Liberation Army amid modernization pushes, with traders eyeing remaining CMC members and Defense Minister Dong Jun as potential targets before the 2027 Party Congress.

markets.question: Al Fateh Saudi Club vs. NEOM SC: O/U 2.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Saudi Professional League game between Al Fateh Saudi Club and NEOM SC, scheduled for May 2 at 10:50 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Al Fateh Saudi Club and NEOM SC combine to score 3 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 3, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on slstat.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

Head-to-head favors Barça (4-1-0), underscoring trader focus on aggregate dynamics, clean sheets, and Salma Paralluelo's form.

markets.question: Will the April 2026 unemployment rate be 4.4%?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the seasonally adjusted unemployment rate (total unemployed, as a percent of the civilian labor force, official unemployment rate denoted as U-3) reported by the Bureau of Labor Statistics in the Employment Situation Report for April 2026.

The resolution source for this market is the Monthly Employment Situation Report, published by the BLS every month at https://www.bls.gov/bls/news-release/empsit.htm, specifically the U-3 measure in Table A-15 for the month in question.

The relevant data release is scheduled for May 8, 2026, at 8:30 AM ET. This market will resolve as soon as the relevant data is issued. Any revisions to the data after the first release will not count toward this market's resolution.

If no data for the specified month is released by the date the next month's data is scheduled to be released, this market will resolve based on data from the last available month.

Note: the resolution source for this market reports unemployment to one decimal point. Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

markets.question: Map 1: Odd/Even Total Kills?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an even number.

"Total combined kills" includes all kills recorded during the match across all rounds, including kills during regulation rounds and overtime rounds if applicable. Team kills (friendly fire) and self-inflicted deaths (e.g., falling damage, own grenade) do not count as kills for the purposes of this market.

If no kills are recorded in Map 1, or if Map 1 is canceled (not played at all), or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Map 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Counter-Strike: Spirit Academy vs Wave Esports (BO3) - Exort Series Main Stage
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Round 1 match between Spirit Academy and Wave Esports in the Exort Series Main Stage, initially scheduled for April 16 at 11:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Spirit Academy" if Spirit Academy win the match against Wave Esports.

This market will resolve to "Wave Esports" if Wave Esports win the match against Spirit Academy.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Spirit Academy faces Wave Esports in a pivotal BO3 Swiss Round 1 matchup at Exort Series #25 Main Stage, with both squads sporting recent roster overhauls—Spirit's young academy lineup (average age 17.6) rebuilt in February around veteran rifler Kiryasoo, while Wave (#149 HLTV) integrated Belof, Katalic, and sheezy in March following mixed March results like early Urban Riga Open exits. markets.question: Will Robinhood Markets, Inc. (HOOD) hit (HIGH) $95 in May?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during May 2026, any 1-minute candle for Robinhood Markets, Inc. (HOOD) has a final "High" price equal to or above the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Robinhood Markets, Inc. (HOOD) "High" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.HOOD%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.HOOD%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily high price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

markets.question: Will the Republican Party win the VA-01 House seat?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the party of the candidate who wins the VA-01 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The midterm elections will take place on November 4, 2026.

​​A candidate's party will be determined by their ballot-listed or otherwise identifiable affiliation with that party at the time all of the 2026 House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources. A candidate without a ballot-listed affiliation to either the Democrat or Republican parties will be considered a member of one of these parties based on the party with which they most recently expressed their intent to caucus at the time all of the House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources.

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the United States government, specifically the Federal Election Commission (https://www.fec.gov/).

Cambridge's recent form bolsters trader sentiment, including a resilient 0-0 draw at leaders Bromley on April 16 and a 4-0 home win over Notts County on April 11, showcasing defensive solidity and attacking threat amid a +31 goal difference. Crewe suffered a 3-2 defeat at Grimsby Town on April 11 despite strong home record (fifth in League Two home table with 40 points), with Owen Lunt unlikely due to a lingering back injury and Mickey Demetriou a managed doubt. Cambridge won their reverse fixture 2-1 in November, heightening stakes as both eye playoff implications.

markets.question: Will Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) hit (HIGH) $6.50 in May?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during May 2026, any 1-minute candle for Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) has a final "High" price equal to or above the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) "High" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.OPEN%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.OPEN%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily high price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

markets.question: Will Encore Medical’s market cap be between $50M and $55M at market close on IPO day?
markets.description:
This market will resolve based on Encore Medical’s market capitalization at the closing price on its first day of trading.

As of market creation, the IPO is scheduled to price on April 22 (ET). If no such IPO occurs by May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "No IPO before June 2026".

Market capitalization expresses the monetary value of a company’s outstanding shares, stated in its pricing currency.

It is calculated as the total number of outstanding shares, multiplied by the official closing share price of the publicly traded class on the first trading day.

If necessary, to accurately capture the company’s total market capitalization, rather than a stock-class-specific market capitalization, the calculation will include all outstanding share classes and apply any stated conversion ratios to the publicly traded class. Where no conversion right exists, such shares will be counted at their stated outstanding amount without discount, unless official filings explicitly specify differently.

The number of outstanding shares will be determined from official company filings or disclosures (e.g., SEC filings). The closing share price on the first trading day will be determined from the primary exchange’s official listing page.

If the relevant value falls exactly between two brackets, this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official company filings and the primary exchange’s official listing page. The market capitalization will be determined through appropriate calculation using the total outstanding shares and the closing price from the first day of trading.

In the event of an interruption in the normal trading session on the specified company’s first day of trading (e.g., a circuit breaker or half-day), the market will resolve according to the official closing price of the abbreviated session. If no such official closing price is published, the market will resolve according to the next trading day on which an official closing price is published, treating that day as the first day of trading for the purposes of this market.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket reflects skepticism toward Encore Medical's timely IPO execution, with "No IPO before June 2026" leading at 37.5% implied probability amid the absence of pricing announcements following the company's April 2026 S-1 registration statement amendments. The Eagan, MN-based cardiac implant developer, targeting patent foramen ovale closures via minimally invasive devices, reports trailing twelve-month revenue of $2.1 million (up 48.8% year-over-year) but ongoing net losses of $1.58 million, heavy debt load, and pre-U.S. commercialization status pending FDA pivotal trial completion targeted for end-2027—despite EU CE Mark approval and sales in 21 countries. Prior terms implied a $49 million fully diluted market cap at $5 per share for a $15 million raise focused on deleveraging, clustering odds in the sub-$55 million brackets (54.1% combined). Upcoming catalysts include SEC effectiveness and potential roadshow amid choppy micro-cap medtech sentiment.

markets.question: Bitcoin Up or Down on May 2?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the "Close" price for the Binance 1 minute candle for BTC/USDT May 1 '26 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) is lower than the final "Close" price for the May 2 '26 12:00 ET candle.

This market will resolve to "Down" if the "Close" price for the Binance 1 minute candle for BTC/USDT May 1 '26 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) is higher than the final "Close" price for the May 2 '26 12:00 ET candle.

If the final "Close" price for both of these candles is exactly equal on Binance, this market will resolve 50-50.

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT "Close" prices currently available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT with "1m" and "Candles" selected on the top bar.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

events.title: Ecuador vs. Curaçao
events.description: This event is for the upcoming FIFA World Cup game, scheduled for Saturday, June 20, 2026 between Ecuador and Curaçao.

eventMetadata.context_description: Ecuador's strong CONMEBOL qualifying campaign, featuring key contributions from Premier League stars like Moisés Caicedo and veteran forward Enner Valencia, positions them as clear trader favorites at 77% implied probability against World Cup debutants Curaçao in this Group E clash at neutral Arrowhead Stadium. Curaçao's historic qualification via dramatic CONCACAF playoffs earned them a spot but highlights their underdog status, with limited high-level experience reflected in the 11% win pricing and 20.5% draw consensus. Recent training camps show clean injury reports for both sides, Ecuador sharpening rapid counters and set-piece execution while Curaçao emphasizes compact defending, though the step-up in class favors La Tri's tactical edge and depth.

markets.question: Will NYC Mayor post 200+ posts from April 28 to May 5, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the number of times NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani (@NYCMayor), posts on X between April 28, 12:00 PM ET and May 5, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

For the purposes of this market, only main feed posts, quote posts and reposts will count.

Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies which are recorded on the main feed will be counted by the tracker.

Deleted posts will count as long as they remain available long enough to be captured by the tracker (~5 minutes).

The resolution source for this market is the "Post Counter" figure for posts found at https://xtracker.polymarket.com. Individual posts can be viewed by clicking "Export Data". If the tracker does not update correctly in accordance with the rules, X itself may be used as a secondary resolution source.

By May 2, he has issued over 15 updates covering May Day solidarity at Washington Square Park rallies, responses to a Williamsburg child pedestrian fatality and a Queens subway shooting, observances for Vesak and Vaisakhi, a Gaza flotilla detention statement, and cultural initiatives like the 2-K jingle contest—maintaining pace without acceleration. Budget pressures and FIFA World Cup planning sustain engagement, but no surge signals keep higher bins like 40-59 at just 7.7%, with resolution post-May 5, 12:00 PM ET.

markets.question: Will Jared Kushner attend the next US x Iran diplomatic meeting?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed individual attends the next diplomatic meeting between representatives of the United States and Iran by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

A diplomatic meeting refers to a deliberate meeting between representatives of the listed countries who are acting in an official capacity and are authorized to engage in negotiation or diplomacy regarding US-Iranian relations on behalf of their governments. Meetings conducted indirectly, for example, through designated mediators, facilitators, or interlocutors acting with the knowledge and authorization of the relevant governments, will qualify.

Brief greetings, chance encounters, or talks otherwise not deliberately aimed at diplomacy or negotiation will not qualify as diplomatic meetings.

The meeting must be in-person (including indirect in-person meetings) and must be publicly acknowledged by either government or reported by a consensus of credible media. Remote meetings, phone calls, or other meetings where the relevant parties are not present will not count.

Attendance refers to the listed individual being physically present and actively participating in negotiations at the meeting.

If the next diplomatic meeting between representatives of the United States and Iran takes place over multiple days, attendance at any part of the meeting will qualify.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the listed individual and the governments of the United States and Iran; however, a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Following inconclusive first-round direct US-Iran talks in Islamabad hosted by Pakistan around April 11-14—featuring US Vice President JD Vance, special envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner opposite Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi and Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf—subsequent sessions stalled after Iranian FM Araghchi's solo visit and President Trump's cancellation of a US team trip last week. Trump voiced dissatisfaction yesterday with Iran's latest proposal to prioritize Strait of Hormuz reopening before nuclear negotiations, as the US reviews it amid ceasefire extensions. No date is set for the next meeting, with backchannel mediation via Oman and Pakistan ongoing, leaving outcomes tied to diplomatic breakthroughs on sanctions, uranium enrichment, and regional escalation risks.

markets.question: Will Meta have the second best AI model at the end of May 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the company that owns the model that has the second-highest arena rank based on the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (https://lmarena.ai/) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on May 31, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

Results from the "Rank" column under the "Text Arena | Overall" Leaderboard tab at https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with style control off will be used to resolve this market.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. If two or more models are tied on rank, they will be ordered by their Arena score, including any underlying, unrounded, granular values reflected in the data below the leaderboard. If a tie remains, alphabetical order of company names as listed in this market group will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if the two models are tied by exact arena score, “Google” would be ranked ahead of “xAI”). This market will resolve based on the company that occupies second place under this ranking system.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and will resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.

markets.question: Will Republicanos (REPUBLICANOS) win the most seats in the next Brazilian Senate election?
markets.description:
The next federal Senate election is scheduled to take place in Brazil on October 4, 2026, in which two-thirds of the Senate’s 81 seats will be contested.

This market will resolve according to the political party that wins the greatest number of seats in the next Brazilian Senate election. 

Only seats contested in the next Brazilian Senate election will be considered.

If the result of this election isn't known definitively by June 30, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on the result of the election, as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the Brazilian government, specifically the Superior Electoral Court (Tribunal Superior Eleitoral, TSE) (e.g., www.tse.jus.br/eleicoes/resultados-eleicoes).

events.title: Next Brazil Senate Election: Most Seats Won
events.description:
The next federal Senate election is scheduled to take place in Brazil on October 4, 2026, in which two-thirds of the Senate’s 81 seats will be contested.

Only seats contested in the next Brazilian Senate election will be considered.

In the event of a tie between multiple parties for the most seats won, this market will resolve in favor of the party whose listed abbreviation appears first in alphabetical order.

This market's resolution will be based solely on the number of seats won by the named party in the Brazilian Senate, not by any federation or coalition it may be a part of.

If the result of this election isn't known definitively by June 30, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on the result of the election, as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the Brazilian government, specifically the Superior Electoral Court (Tribunal Superior Eleitoral, TSE) (e.g., www.tse.jus.br/eleicoes/resultados-eleicoes).

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus strongly favors the PL to secure the most seats among the 54 Senate positions up for renewal in Brazil's October 4, 2026 general election, reflecting the party's accelerated formation of competitive slates across states following the April party-switching window, where PL gained high-profile recruits like Sergio Moro. Recent polls, including Paraná Pesquisas and Quaest surveys from March 2026, show PL candidates leading in key states such as Rio de Janeiro, Distrito Federal, and Santa Catarina, bolstering projections of 20-22 seats. União Brasil trails as a distant second amid right-wing consolidation against centrão fragmentation, while PT lags due to weaker state-level positioning; upcoming primaries and coalition negotiations could shift dynamics before the vote.

markets.question: Will the lowest temperature in Miami be 69°F or below on May 3?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the lowest temperature recorded at the Miami Intl Airport Station in degrees Fahrenheit on 3 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the lowest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Miami Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/us/fl/miami/KMIA.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Fahrenheit (eg, 21°F). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

Light south winds of 5-10 mph and dewpoints near 70°F will limit radiational cooling overnight, while urban heat island effects and residual sea breeze moisture temper drops below 73°F; higher bins reflect potential lingering clouds or gustier flow. High pressure ridge over Florida ensures mostly clear skies, consistent with recent clear nights yielding lows of 74°F on May 1. New GFS and ECMWF runs expected this evening, plus NWS update, could sharpen differentiation as proximity to resolution heightens sensitivity to real-time observations.

If a tie remains, alphabetical order of company names as listed in this market group will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if the two models are tied by exact arena score, “Google” would be ranked ahead of “xAI”). This market will resolve based on the company that occupies first place under this ranking system.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.
